title: Reuse exact owner reads through a mutation-free INSIGHTS capability set
description: Give INSIGHTS stable raw plan, exact position, and dated actual evidence without granting plan mutation, copying projection logic, or permitting mixed corrected states.
decision: Publish BudgetPlanRevisionDetail and BudgetPosition as the shared owner and INSIGHTS read DTOs. Publish a versioned BudgetReadCapabilityDescriptor containing budget.plan.revision.get, budget.position.get, and the read-only budget.insights.evidence.get operation. The composite operation binds one immutable plan revision, invokes the released LEDGER actuals query once, reuses that complete materialized snapshot for the canonical BudgetPositionCalculator, and returns the plan detail, exact BudgetPosition, bounded dated ActualsItem members, shared snapshot provenance, calculation schema version, and evidence-binding fingerprint. A future concrete INSIGHTS client invokes only these released descriptors through the shared operation executor. No mutation descriptor, private storage, second LEDGER read by INSIGHTS, duplicated calculator, transport port, report state, analytics field, or consumer state crosses this boundary.
rationale: A second INSIGHTS projection or calculation would drift from what the owner reconciles, while exposing every BUDGET descriptor would make mutation authority ambiguous. The 2026-07-20 A3 spike proved that the prior independent position and actuals reads can mix corrected generations: 1000 of 1000 forced controls mixed. Reusing BUDGET's one already materialized public LEDGER snapshot for both the canonical position and returned dated members produced 2000 of 2000 coherent pre or post results with zero reconciliation failures. The capability descriptor remains the auditable mutation-free boundary.
alternatives: A: duplicate INSIGHTS DTOs and calculation, rejected for parity drift. B: keep independent budget.position.get and ledger.actuals.query calls, rejected by the A3 correction-race control. C: expose a consumed LEDGER cursor to INSIGHTS, rejected for expiry and cross-owner cursor coupling. D: keep exact owner reads and add one BUDGET-owned composite evidence read over the same materialized snapshot, chosen.
consequences: Consumer compatibility tests prove schema identity, provenance completeness, single-snapshot member and position reconciliation, forced concurrent-correction behavior, resource bounds, forbidden analytics fields, and absence of mutation operations. The existing plan and position reads remain unchanged. INSIGHTS owns reports and interpretation and treats LEDGER as cited transitive provenance. The consumer dependency remains assumed until production conformance validates the pairing.
status_notes: Accepted and refined by the 2026-07-20 INSIGHTS A3 spike; DD-INSIGHTS-COHERENT-PUBLIC-EVIDENCE records the consumer decision.
